name: olw-bootstrap
description: Generate comprehensive Operational Language Wiki systems from domain knowledge
author: Claude
capabilities: Analyzes domain context and institutional knowledge

domain_context.description: Path to config/docs or direct domain description

output_directory.description: Directory path for wiki HML files

examples: Use olw-bootstrap to create a wiki from globals/metadata/promptql-config.hml
Build a wiki system for our healthcare domain documented in docs/domain-model.md
Generate OLW pages from the system instructions in config.hml
